dialogue_texts: It's been a while since I've been at Mayohiga.
Usually, things are a bit more lively, but it feels like the trees themselves are avoiding me.
Hmph. That voice must be the "Queen" herself. What has brought you here, my Majesty?
I'm on a royal investigation. There's a nasty rumor about some "glohm" substance.
If any of that filth reaches Mayohiga, I will purify it myself.
Y'know, a shrine maiden's work will never be finished.
A kitsune shrine maiden, eh? Chief Justice Reimu's gonna have some competition with you.
I just train to protect my town.
Speaking of which, you're looking a bit stiff, my Majesty. Do you need any purification?
I'm your queen, so please do so.
Well, I was just being sarcastic.
This "purification" will be done with danmaku.
Hey, you're not supposed to treat a member of royalty like that!
Let the morning sun and I burn away your doubts!
